positive: A stylized, symmetrical celestial map composition featuring overlapping geometric moons, abstract constellation lines, and stylized constellations of deep indigo and teal. The design must be centered and highly contrasting, utilizing clean vector lines and thick outlines against a contrasting midnight blue background. Incorporate stylized floral mandalas (e.g., lotus, abstract rings) formed by geometric celestial elements. Style: Neo-tribal, clean etching, graphic novel quality. Lighting: Flat, balanced, high contrast. Composition: Perfect symmetry, suitable for repeating textile print or a single central graphic.
negative: text, words, letters, logo, trademark, watermark, signature, copyright, blurry, out of focus, grain, noise, artifacts, messy, asymmetrical, bad anatomy, extra limbs, ugly, poorly drawn, jpeg artifacts, low detail
